content: It will almost never work cause doorstain kill ramona first

correct… but eh its ultimately Arc 1 with an OE 70 Dore will still just oneshot

and it worked anyway so <:JenkinsShrug:1439396974767112262>

I started recently and have been working my way through the story and have been enjoying the game a ton! Mainly looking on advice on which units to invest in first and where to spend or save resources. 

I have been going back and forth between using Vortice and Kath and enjoy both. I have 8000 Silver and I spent a little and have 2800 Prime. I have only pulled on the Kath and Vortice banners so far. I also bought the fated pulls for Chaos and Caro. When I first started I selected the units for the Moonless right away and should have waited. I havnt pulled on it at all though. I selected Lily, Thais, Horla, and GHelot based off of a guide for the units on the banner. 

I have been pulling randomly on the Normal banners and have not pulled for any wheels. I used one Wheel Selector on Blade of the Titan and Have 1 Wheel Selector and 3 Standard Unit Selectors saved.  

I was not having a lot of luck on the Kath banner and got impatient and wanted to use her and used my Universal Dupe to get her to E3. I still have the one for this month in the shop. 

Now that I plan on sticking with the game and spent some money I was just looking for some general advice on which Units to invest in first, a sample team for story, what to get with the selectors or to save them and where to spend or save both normal and limited pulls or other general progression advice. 

Thank you!

Since that might be a little to broad some more specific questions would be, should I focus on building around Kath or vortice first? If it’s vortice should I pull for dupes for her, or maybe do the blue fated pull to try to get better limited support units for her? Should I pull for either of their wheels?  What standard banner should I focus on now that I have a few units in each faction or should I start pulling for the standard wheels. Should I pull on the moonless banner for Ghelot and Horla even though I already have a copy of Thais and Horla? Is now a good time to use the standard selectors or should I save those to use them for dupes?
